product_summary: Practical algorithms for general image/video restoration and upscaling using deep learning. Supports Apple Silicon via Metal Performance Shaders (MPS) for GPU acceleration on Mac, with ncnn-vulkan binaries for macOS.
feature_list: Apple Silicon MPS (Metal Performance Shaders) GPU acceleration
replacement_notes: Real-ESRGAN is the most popular open-source AI image upscaler with 28K+ stars. It supports Apple Silicon via MPS and provides pre-built ncnn-vulkan macOS executables for GPU-accelerated upscaling. BSD-3-Clause license.

product_summary: An open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions — install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM. Built by Block (formerly Square), it features a plugin/extension ecosystem for extending agent capabilities.
feature_list: Extensible plugin/skill system for adding capabilities
Install, execute, edit and test code autonomously
replacement_notes: Goose by Block is an open-source extensible AI coding agent with 22.2K stars and active development. Its plugin/extension system allows installable modules to expand capabilities, directly matching OMI OpenCode's plugin bundle concept. Apache-2.0 license.

product_summary: Automatically index HackerNews content, extract topics using AI (LLM-based extraction), and query trending discussions in real-time. Uses CocoIndex for incremental pipeline processing.
replacement_notes: Uses AI/LLM to automatically index and analyze Hacker News content, extracting topics and enabling querying of trending discussions — closely matching HN Time Capsule's AI analysis of Hacker News history. Open source, actively maintained.

product_summary: An Excel AI agent that uses MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools to let LLMs read, edit, and automate Excel spreadsheets. Includes ~30 tools for direct Excel file manipulation and supports multiple LLM backends.
feature_list: AI agent that reads, edits, and automates spreadsheets
Supports multiple LLM models (GPT-4o, Claude, etc.)
Slack bot integration for Excel workflows
Configurable experiment runner with task inputs
replacement_notes: sv-excel-agent is an almost exact functional match — an AI assistant specifically for Excel that uses MCP tools, letting LLMs read, edit, and automate Excel spreadsheets. MIT license.

product_summary: A fancy self-hosted monitoring tool for tracking the online/offline status of servers, websites, and services. Provides real-time uptime monitoring with a beautiful dashboard and 90+ notification integrations.
feature_list: 90+ notification channels (Telegram, Discord, Slack, Email, etc.)
Fancy reactive dashboard with real-time status
replacement_notes: Uptime Kuma is the most popular self-hosted monitoring tool (60K+ stars) for tracking device/service online status. MIT license. Very actively maintained with frequent releases.

product_summary: The best open-source tool for website change detection, web page monitoring, and website change alerts. Monitors websites for content changes, price drops, restock alerts, and defacement.
feature_list: Website content change detection and alerts
Browser automation via Playwright (click, fill, login)
Visual selector for targeting specific page elements
Price and restock monitoring for e-commerce
replacement_notes: changedetection.io (29.2K stars) is the leading open-source web monitoring and alert platform — a direct replacement for Open Scouts' AI web monitoring and alerting functionality. Apache-2.0 license.

product_summary: A Rust library for SQL databases that includes a SQL parser, execution layer, and pluggable storage backends (in-memory, Sled, Redb, JSON, WebStorage, IndexedDB). Works as an embedded SQL engine in Rust and JavaScript/WASM environments.
feature_list: Full SQL parser and execution engine in Rust
Multiple storage backends (Sled, Redb, JSON, in-memory)
Embeddable as a library with zero external requirements
AST Builder for programmatic query construction
replacement_notes: GlueSQL (3K stars) is a mature Rust embedded SQL database engine with pluggable storage — matching Stoolop's core function. Apache-2.0 license.

product_summary: Python SDK and Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI-compatible format. Provides unified interface for routing across multiple LLM providers with cost tracking, guardrails, load balancing, fallbacks, and logging.
feature_list: Unified API for 100+ LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure, Bedrock, etc.)
Intelligent routing and load balancing across models
Cost tracking and budget management per project/user
Streaming, tool calling, structured outputs support
replacement_notes: LiteLLM is the leading open-source multi-LLM orchestration framework with 25K+ stars. Provides a unified interface for calling and routing between 100+ LLMs. MIT license. Extremely actively maintained.

product_summary: A barebones, lightweight library for building AI agents that think in code. Core agent logic fits in ~1,000 lines of code. Supports CodeAgent and ToolCallingAgent, with multi-agent hierarchies and sandboxed execution.
feature_list: CodeAgent writes actions as executable Python code
Sandboxed code execution (E2B, Docker, Modal, Pyodide)
HuggingFace Hub integration for sharing tools/agents
replacement_notes: smolagents by Hugging Face is the most prominent lightweight agent framework — ~1,000 lines of core code epitomizes a minimal agent library. Apache-2.0 license. Actively maintained by the Hugging Face team.

product_summary: Universal memory layer for AI agents. Provides persistent, intelligent, human-like memory and recall for any LLM, enabling personalized AI interactions across sessions.
feature_list: Persistent semantic memory for LLM agents
Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, and other providers
Search, add, get, delete memory operations
MCP server integration for Claude Desktop, Cursor, etc.
replacement_notes: mem0 is the most popular open-source persistent semantic memory system for AI agents (38k+ stars). Provides the same core functionality as Unsevered Memory with broader provider support. Apache-2.0 license.

product_summary: Official enhanced front-end implementation of ComfyUI, rebuilt with Vue.js/TypeScript. Provides a modern, extensible UI for the ComfyUI Stable Diffusion workflow tool with native localization and extension API.
feature_list: Extension API for custom sidebar tabs and commands
Auto-convert widgets to inputs on link drop
Daily release cycle with frequent updates
replacement_notes: ComfyUI Frontend is the official enhanced frontend for ComfyUI, separated into its own repository in August 2024. Directly replaces any third-party enhanced UIs. GPL-3.0 license.

product_summary: High-fidelity command-line tool for detecting React Server Component and Next.js vulnerabilities. Developed by Assetnote's security research team with safe side-channel detection modes.
feature_list: JSON output for integration with other tools
replacement_notes: The authoritative React2Shell scanner built by Assetnote (Searchlight Cyber). The most trusted and widely referenced scanner for Next.js/RSC vulnerabilities in the security community.

product_summary: AI-powered tool that turns research papers, reports, and documents into professional slides and posters using a 4-stage RAG-powered pipeline. Supports PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Markdown and more.
feature_list: Universal document support (PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, Markdown)
RAG-powered content extraction for comprehensive insight capture
Source-linked accuracy with traceability to original documents
Custom styling via natural language or built-in themes
Fast preview mode for rapid experimentation
replacement_notes: HKUDS/Paper2Slides is a document-to-slides converter with the same name and functionality. Built by HKU Data Science lab. MIT license, actively maintained.

product_summary: Agentic Video Generation framework that serves as Director, Screenwriter, Producer, and Video Generator All-in-One. Transforms raw ideas into complete video stories through intelligent multi-agent workflows.
feature_list: Multi-agent workflow (scriptwriting, storyboarding, character creation, video generation)
Character consistency across shots via reference image system
Shot-level storyboard design with cinematography language
replacement_notes: ViMax is the best actively maintained open-source replacement for AI storyboard-to-video generation. Handles complete pipeline from storyboard to video with character consistency. 2.2k stars, MIT license.

product_summary: Mini CLI search engine for markdown docs, knowledge bases, meeting notes, and more. Combines BM25 full-text search, vector semantic search, and LLM re-ranking, all running locally.
feature_list: Vector semantic search via local embeddings
Hybrid search with LLM-powered query expansion and re-ranking
Collection management for organizing different document sets
Multiple output formats (JSON, CSV, Markdown, XML)
Runs entirely locally via node-llama-cpp with GGUF models
replacement_notes: tobi/qmd is a direct functional match for QMD (Quick Markdown Search). Provides fast search across markdown files with three search modes. 316 stars. Created by Tobi Lütke (Shopify CEO).

product_summary: An automatic prompt optimization framework for Large Language Models by Salesforce AI Research. Provides structured approach to prompt optimization with support for multiple LLM providers.
feature_list: Framework-agnostic design supporting OpenAI, Anthropic, Cohere
Automated iterative prompt refinement using DSPy
Support for custom CSV training data
replacement_notes: Promptomatix from Salesforce AI Research is the best multi-provider prompt optimization framework. Supports multiple LLM providers and automates prompt optimization. Apache-2.0 license.

product_summary: Feature-rich browser-based interface for Stable Diffusion image generation. Supports text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting, outpainting, and many advanced features with extensive model support.
feature_list: Supports SD 1.x, 2.x, SDXL, and Flux models
Low VRAM optimizations (works with 2GB+ GPU RAM)
replacement_notes: The most popular open-source AI image generation interface with 158k stars. Comprehensive image generation capabilities. AGPL-3.0 license.

product_summary: Efficient 6-billion-parameter bilingual (English & Chinese) image generation model family by Tongyi MAI (Alibaba). Excels in photorealistic generation, bilingual text rendering, and instruction adherence.
feature_list: Photorealistic generation with fine detail control
ComfyUI, SGLang, and Candle integration support
replacement_notes: Z-Image is a leading open-source bilingual image generation model. Natively supports English and Chinese text rendering. 9.9k stars, Apache-2.0 license.

product_summary: A macOS Messages.app CLI to send, read, and stream iMessage/SMS with attachment metadata. Uses AppleScript for sending and read-only DB access for receiving.
feature_list: Send text and attachments via iMessage or SMS
View message history with date filters
Live stream new messages via filesystem events
replacement_notes: steipete/imsg is the most complete and actively maintained iMessage CLI on GitHub. Supports sending, reading, streaming, chat listing, and filtering on macOS 14+. MIT license.

product_summary: A visual prompt management system for AI image generation. Provides an intuitive web interface to organize, browse, and manage artistic style prompts with visual references and image previews.
feature_list: Visual interactive cards with hover descriptions
Full CRUD operations (add, edit, delete, reorder)
JSON-based storage for easy versioning and sharing
replacement_notes: intelligencedev/PromptForge is a direct functional match for a visual prompt library/manager with Flask-based web UI, visual card previews, and category organization. Open source.

product_summary: An AI-powered tool that lets you describe UI using natural language, then see it rendered live. Supports converting HTML to React, Svelte, Web Components, and more. Built by Weights & Biases.
feature_list: Describe UI in natural language and see it rendered live
Convert HTML to React, Svelte, Web Components
Supports OpenAI, Groq, Anthropic, Gemini, and local models via LiteLLM
Live preview and iteration on designs
Ollama integration for local open-source models
replacement_notes: wandb/openui is the closest open-source match for AI-powered UI/UX design intelligence. Uses LLMs to generate UI from natural language. Apache-2.0 license, 21.8k stars.

product_summary: Spreadsheet Calculator Improvised — an ncurses-based, vim-like spreadsheet calculator for the terminal. Based on the classic 'sc' program with modern enhancements.
feature_list: Vim-like movement commands and key mappings
CSV/TAB/XLSX import and export, ODS import, Markdown export
Direct RGB color support and cell formatting (bold, italic, underline)
Wide character support for multiple languages
replacement_notes: sc-im is the most popular and fully-featured terminal spreadsheet application on GitHub. Provides a complete spreadsheet experience with vim-like keybindings and formula support. BSD license.

product_summary: A beautiful, non-destructive, and GPU-accelerated RAW image editor built with performance in mind. Features professional color grading tools, tone curves, masking, and more.
feature_list: Full RAW format support via rawler library
GPU-accelerated processing with custom WGSL shader
Color grading: temperature, tint, vibrance, saturation, HSL mixer, color wheels
LUT support, dehaze, vignette, film grain effects
Batch export and image library management
replacement_notes: RapidRAW is an actively developed RAW photo editor with comprehensive color grading capabilities including tone curves, HSL mixer, color wheels, and LUT application. AGPL-3.0 license, 3.6k stars.

product_summary: Open-source LLM engineering platform providing LLM observability, metrics, evaluations, prompt management, playground, and datasets. Tracks and monitors AI/LLM application sessions.
feature_list: Session-based analysis for user-facing AI apps
Cost, latency, and token usage monitoring
User feedback collection and manual labeling
Integrates with OpenTelemetry, LangChain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM
replacement_notes: Langfuse is the most comprehensive open-source LLM session monitoring and observability platform. Tracks LLM calls, agent sessions, costs, and performance metrics. MIT license.

product_summary: A privacy-first, open-source knowledge base that works on top of local plain-text Markdown and Org-mode files. Supports knowledge graphs, bi-directional linking, and is widely used for research workflows.
feature_list: Plain-text Markdown and Org-mode file storage
Bi-directional linking and knowledge graph visualization
replacement_notes: Logseq is the leading open-source personal knowledge management tool for research. Combines outliner-style note-taking with knowledge graphs and research-friendly features. AGPL-3.0 license, 30k+ stars.

product_summary: A Markdown editor for the 21st century — a one-stop publication workbench supporting academic writing, Zettelkasten, and documentation with built-in Mermaid diagram rendering.
feature_list: Full Markdown editing with WYSIWYM rendering
Multiple document tabs and split windows
Export via Pandoc to PDF, DOCX, HTML, and more
Spell checking and LanguageTool grammar checking
replacement_notes: Zettlr is a full-featured Markdown editor with built-in Mermaid diagram support — directly replacing MarkX's core function of markdown editing with diagrams. GPL-3.0 license.

product_summary: Easy-to-use audio stem separation from CLI or as a Python package, using pre-trained models from Ultimate Vocal Remover (UVR) including Demucs, MDX-Net, VR Arch, and MDXC architectures.
feature_list: Separate audio into stems (vocals, drums, bass, guitar, piano, other)
Supports multiple model architectures: Demucs, MDX-Net, VR Arch, MDXC
Supports all common audio formats (WAV, MP3, FLAC, M4A)
Multiple pre-trained models from UVR ecosystem
replacement_notes: python-audio-separator wraps all major separation models (including Demucs) from the UVR ecosystem into a clean CLI/Python interface. More versatile than Demucs alone since it supports multiple architectures. MIT license.

product_summary: Edit PDF files using natural language commands powered by Gemini AI. Converts PDF pages to images, uses AI to generate edited versions based on natural language prompts, performs OCR to restore text.
feature_list: Natural language PDF editing via Gemini AI
Page rendering to images using Poppler
Style reference pages for matching visual style (fonts, colors, layout)
OCR re-hydration with Tesseract for searchable text
PDF stitching to preserve document structure
replacement_notes: Near-perfect functional match. Nano-PDF uses Gemini AI to edit PDFs with natural language instructions — the exact core functionality of NanoPDF Editor. MIT license, 712 stars.

product_summary: A full-featured browser interface for Stable Diffusion with a built-in REST API server for text-to-image generation. Supports txt2img, img2img, inpainting, and upscaling via API endpoints.
feature_list: Built-in REST API for text-to-image generation (--api flag)
Multiple model support (SD 1.5, SD 2.x, SDXL, SD3)
replacement_notes: The most widely-used open-source text-to-image generation server. With --api flag, it functions as a high-speed API server for text-to-image generation. AGPL-3.0 license, 160k stars.

product_summary: A browser extension and cross-platform desktop application for AI-powered translation using ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and other LLM APIs. Supports text selection translation, word polishing, and summarization across 55+ languages.
feature_list: Vocabulary book with AI-generated memory aids
Supports both OpenAI and Azure OpenAI Service
replacement_notes: Closest match for a browser-based AI translation extension. Provides the exact same functionality: an AI-powered browser extension for translation. AGPL-3.0 license, ~24k stars.

product_summary: The free, open-source alternative to OpenAI that supports distributed, peer-to-peer, and decentralized AI inference. Self-hosted, local-first, with P2P federated mode for AI swarms.
feature_list: P2P decentralized inference and AI swarms
Text generation, image generation, audio, video, voice cloning
No GPU required - runs on consumer hardware
Backend gallery with installable model backends
replacement_notes: Best open-source match for decentralized AI compute. LocalAI's P2P Dashboard, federated mode, and AI Swarms features provide decentralized computing for AI workloads. MIT license.

product_summary: An open-source autonomous AI software development agent platform (formerly OpenDevin). Cloud-based and remotely controlled AI coding agents that can modify code, run commands, browse the web, and call APIs.
feature_list: Autonomous AI coding agent with terminal/browser/editor access
Remote operation via CLI, REST API, GUI, and GitHub Actions
Integrations with GitHub, GitLab, CI/CD, Slack
replacement_notes: Premier open-source replacement for remotely-controlled AI coding agents. Supports remote operation via REST API, cloud deployment, and GitHub issue assignment. MIT license, 65k+ stars.

product_summary: Diagram as Code tool for prototyping cloud system architecture designs in Python. Allows creating interactive system architecture diagrams without design tools, supporting major cloud providers.
feature_list: Cloud provider support: AWS, Azure, GCP, Oracle, Alibaba
Multiple output formats (PNG, SVG, PDF, DOT)
Used by Apache Airflow for architecture docs
replacement_notes: The most popular open-source tool for creating system architecture diagrams. Leading tool for system design visualization. MIT license, 40k+ stars.

product_summary: An open-source payments switch written in Rust designed to make payments fast, reliable, and affordable. Provides modular payment infrastructure with intelligent routing, vault, reconciliation, and multi-PSP orchestration.
feature_list: Real-time intelligent payment routing across multiple PSPs
PCI-compliant vault for payment method storage
Revenue recovery with retry engine (30+ parameters)
Alternative payment methods (PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, BNPL)
Written in Rust for high performance
replacement_notes: Production-grade, real-time payment processing architecture with modular components. Apache-2.0 license, 39.1k stars, PCI DSS 4.0 compliant.

product_summary: A leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine with Docker-first deployment. Provides deep document understanding with configurable LLMs, hybrid search, and streamlined RAG orchestration.
feature_list: Deep document understanding (PDF, Word, slides, Excel, images, web)
Hybrid search: vector similarity + BM25 with fused re-ranking
Configurable LLMs and embedding models (Ollama, OpenAI, etc.)
Visual text chunking with human intervention
replacement_notes: Best actively-maintained Docker-based self-hosted RAG server. Matches the core concept of a 'Docker RAG server' for knowledge bases. Apache-2.0 license, 40k+ stars.

product_summary: A CLI tool and Python library for running prompts against large language models. Supports 50+ LLM providers via plugins, both through remote APIs and local models.
feature_list: Run LLM prompts from command-line or Python
Support for 50+ LLM providers via plugins (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, etc.)
Local model support via Ollama, llama.cpp
replacement_notes: Simon Willison's 'llm' is the most popular CLI tool for running/executing LLM prompts — exactly matching Run Prompt's core function. Apache-2.0 license, 10.2k stars.

product_summary: A highly customizable neutral new tab page accented with a chosen colour. Customize the layout, style, background, and bookmarks to create a personalized browser start page.
feature_list: Fully customizable layout, style, and background
Available as Chrome and Firefox extension
replacement_notes: nightTab is one of the most popular open-source startpage projects — highly customizable, works on both Chrome and Firefox, and is privacy-friendly. GPL-3.0 license.

product_summary: A web-based user interface for the aria2 download manager. Provides a modern, responsive web UI to manage downloads of HTTP, FTP, BitTorrent, and Magnet links through a browser.
feature_list: File selection for torrents and metalinks
Direct file download from webui dashboard
Can run as self-hosted service on NAS/server
replacement_notes: webui-aria2 is the closest match to Stacks' core function of a web-based download manager with UI. Self-hostable with Docker. MIT license, 9k+ stars.

product_summary: A cinematic Git commit replay tool for the terminal that turns your Git history into a living, animated story with realistic typing animations, syntax highlighting, and file tree transitions.
feature_list: Cinematic commit replay with typing animations
Multiple display modes: screensaver, single commit, range replay
Built in Rust for speed and efficiency
replacement_notes: gitlogue transforms commit diffs into animated terminal experiences with typing simulations, directly aligning with the 'cinematic code history view' concept. ISC License.

product_summary: An HTML parsing/serialization toolset for Node.js that is fully WHATWG HTML Living Standard (HTML5) compliant. The fastest spec-compliant HTML parser for Node.js.
feature_list: Full WHATWG HTML Living Standard compliance
Tree adapters for different DOM implementations
Used by major projects (Cheerio, Angular, etc.)
Works in browser and Node.js environments
replacement_notes: parse5 is the gold standard JavaScript HTML5 parser library. Most widely used spec-compliant HTML5 parser, used by Cheerio and Angular. MIT License.

product_summary: A terminal-based markdown reader designed to render markdown beautifully on the CLI. Discover markdown files, read documentation directly on the command line with syntax highlighting and multiple themes.
feature_list: Local markdown file discovery and Git repo browsing
Fetch READMEs directly from GitHub/GitLab URLs
Stash feature for saving and organizing markdown files
replacement_notes: Glow is the premier terminal markdown tool by Charm. Rich markdown rendering with file discovery, remote fetching, and stash organization ideal for research. MIT License, 21k+ stars.

product_summary: A keyboard-driven database management TUI (terminal user interface) tool, primarily designed for PostgreSQL, with support for MySQL, SQLite, and Oracle databases.
feature_list: SQL query editor with syntax highlighting
Support for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, Oracle
replacement_notes: rainfrog is the best replacement for keyboard-driven PostgreSQL management. Emphasizes keyboard navigation with a clean TUI, built in Rust. MIT License, 4.6k stars.

product_summary: A simple, annotation-based library by Airbnb for making deep link handling better on Android. Provides declarative URL routing and deep link registration with type-safe parameter handling.
feature_list: URL route matching with path and query parameters
Regex pattern support for URL matching
Support for App Links and custom URI schemes
Widely used in production (Airbnb and many others)
replacement_notes: DeepLinkDispatch by Airbnb is the most popular open-source deep linking toolkit (4.4k stars). Comprehensive toolkit for handling deep links and universal links. Apache-2.0 License.

product_summary: A self-hosted media server focused on video content (Movies, Series & Anime). An alternative to Jellyfin or Plex with automatic metadata fetching and minimal maintenance requirements.
feature_list: Self-hosted media server for movies, TV shows, and anime
Automatic metadata fetching (no manual edits needed)
Modern web UI for browsing media
replacement_notes: Kyoo is an excellent self-hosted media library manager for movies/TV shows. Automatic media scanning, metadata fetching, and a modern UI with minimal setup. GPL-3.0 License.

product_summary: Open-source real estate management system that helps manage properties, rentals, tenants, leases, and payment tracking with Docker-based deployment.
feature_list: Centralized property and tenant information management
Rent lease creation with customizable templates
Rent payment tracking and overdue alerts
replacement_notes: MicroRealEstate is the most actively maintained open-source real estate management system (981 stars, MIT license). Tracks properties, manages listings, notes, and financial data.

product_summary: Open-source, self-hosted note-taking and journaling service with privacy-first design. No tracking, no ads, no subscription fees.
feature_list: Privacy-first — no tracking, ads, or telemetry
Markdown support for rich text entries
Built with Go and React for fast performance
replacement_notes: Memos is the premier self-hosted journaling/note-taking service on GitHub with 40,000+ stars. Lightweight, privacy-first daily journaling platform. MIT license.

product_summary: Open-source ChatGPT alternative that runs 100% offline on your computer. Download and run LLMs locally with full privacy, no cloud dependencies.
feature_list: Download and run LLMs (Llama, Gemma, Qwen, etc.) from HuggingFace
Cloud integration option (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Groq)
replacement_notes: Jan is the leading open-source local-first AI assistant with 40,200+ stars. Runs entirely on your device with no internet required. AGPLv3 license.

product_summary: A concurrent and efficient proxy checker for testing HTTP, SOCKS4, and SOCKS5 proxies with a modern PyQt6-based GUI interface.
feature_list: HTTP, SOCKS4, and SOCKS5 proxy support
Configurable timeout, retries, and custom test URL
Detailed results: response times, anonymity classification, geo-location
Multiple export formats: TXT, CSV, JSON
Progress bars and real-time log output
replacement_notes: Jesewe/proxy-checker is a Python-based GUI proxy checker (MIT license) that closely matches Proxy Checker Pro's core function of GUI-based proxy validation with PyQt6 interface.

product_summary: Command-line utility to convert STL files to STEP (ISO 10303-21) files with direct triangle-to-triangle conversion and tolerance-based edge merging.
feature_list: Converts ASCII and binary STL files to STEP format
Tolerance-based edge merging for cleaner output
No dependencies on OpenCASCADE or FreeCAD
replacement_notes: stltostp is the most direct open-source replacement for STL-to-STEP conversion. Lightweight, focused single-purpose design matching Stepify's function.

product_summary: A lightweight Python package for scraping Reddit posts, comments, user data, and media without requiring official Reddit API keys.
feature_list: No Reddit API keys required — uses public .json endpoints
Post scraping with title, body, and full comment trees
User data scraping (recent posts and comments)
Subreddit posts fetching with category and time filters
Proxy rotation support for large-scale scraping
Installable as Python package via pip
replacement_notes: YARS is a modern, actively maintained Reddit scraper (~156 stars, MIT license). Covers all core scraping functions: subreddits, posts, comments, user data, and media downloading without API keys.

product_summary: An open-source Kanban board for orchestrating AI coding agents in parallel. Manage tasks, assign multiple AI agents, review diffs, and merge code from a unified visual interface.
feature_list: Kanban board UI (To Do → In Progress → Review → Done)
Parallel AI agent execution in isolated Git worktrees
Support for Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Codex, OpenAI, and more
Built-in diff viewer for code review
One-click PR creation and merge on GitHub
Open in IDE integration (VSCode, SSH remote)
replacement_notes: Vibe Kanban is the premier open-source Kanban board for AI agents with 9,400+ stars. Precisely matches VibeConBon's concept of a Kanban-style board for managing AI agent tasks. Apache 2.0 license.
